hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */Migrations/*|*/bin/*|*/obj/*|*package-lock.json) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Generated file — never hand-edit. Migrations: use dotnet ef migrations add (see .claude/skills/db-migrate). bin/obj: build artifacts. package-lock.json: run npm instead."}}' ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.cs|*.razor) touch /tmp/bullet-heaven-build-pending; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PIPELINE MANDATORY: code file changed — follow .claude/rules/pipeline.md (qa-reviewer → test-generator → docs-generator; + playwright-e2e for .razor/Game.Render.cs) before responding."}}' ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; }

input=$(cat); [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; [ -f /tmp/bullet-heaven-build-pending ] || exit 0; rm -f /tmp/bullet-heaven-build-pending; out=$(cd /home/alon/Desktop/Bullet-Heaven && dotnet build BulletHeaven.slnx --nologo -v q 2>&1) || { printf 'BUILD GATE FAILED — the solution does not compile. Fix before finishing:\n%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; }
